ogTitle: Rathscar West vs Ravenswood: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rathscar West and Ravenswood.
heading: Rathscar West vs Ravenswood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rathscar West, Victoria and Ravenswood, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rathscar West has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Ravenswood (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rathscar West or Ravenswood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rathscar West has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Ravenswood scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rathscar West scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Ravenswood scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rathscar West or Ravenswood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rathscar West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
